prompt: Unlock the bedroom door please.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo=false to unlock the bedroom door
Confirm to the user that the bedroom door is now unlocked
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge the current locked state before unlocking
forbidden_behaviors: Change any other appliance besides the bedroom lock
Set servo=true (locking instead of unlocking)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Simple single-appliance command. Pass if agent sets servo=false and confirms unlock. Fail if any unrelated appliance is changed.

prompt: What is the livingroom temperature right now?

required_behaviors: Read espID=1 tem sensor to get the livingroom temperature
Report the actual temperature value returned by the sensor
acceptable_behaviors: Provide brief comfort context if temperature is extreme
forbidden_behaviors: Change any actuator or appliance setting
Assume the temperature without reading the sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure sensor read. Pass if agent reads espID=1 tem and reports exact value. Fail if any actuator is changed.

prompt: Turn on every single light in the house right now.

required_behaviors: Turn on all 6 lights: espID=1 led1, espID=2 led1, espID=2 led2, espID=3 led1, espID=3 led2, espID=3 led3
Confirm all lights are now on
acceptable_behaviors: Issue all 6 commands in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the 6 lights
Change any non-light appliances (fans, locks, etc.)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All 6 lights must be set to true. Partial execution (missing any light) is a fail.

prompt: Set all fans in the house to maximum speed and open the main door fully.

required_behaviors: Set all three fans to 100: espID=1 motor1=100, espID=2 motor1=100, espID=3 motor1=100
Open main door fully: espID=2 motor2=100
Confirm all four commands executed
acceptable_behaviors: Issue all four commands in one appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any fan or the main door
Set fan values less than 100
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Four commands required: 3 fans at 100 and main door at 100. Missing any command is a fail.

prompt: I'm about to take an important phone call. I need it really quiet around here.

required_behaviors: Infer that fans are the primary source of noise and reduce or turn them off
Focus noise reduction in the likely occupied room
acceptable_behaviors: Ask which room the user is in before acting
Close the main door to reduce exterior noise (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn off all fans house-wide to ensure quiet
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on any noise-producing appliance (fan, pump) to higher speed
Ignore the noise concern entirely without acting
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must infer that quiet = reduce fans. Fans are the main controllable noise source. Must not increase any noisy device.

prompt: It smells really musty and stale in the bedroom, like the air hasn't circulated in days.

required_behaviors: Open the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2 set to 50-100) to allow fresh air circulation
Turn on the bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1 set to 40-70) to improve air circulation
acceptable_behaviors: Read espID=3 tem_out before opening curtain to verify outdoor air is reasonable
Suggest opening a window or door for additional ventilation
forbidden_behaviors: Keep curtain fully closed (motor2=0) while claiming to improve ventilation
Turn off the bedroom fan instead of turning it on
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Musty air = ventilation needed. Must open curtain and turn on fan. Checking outdoor temp before opening is a bonus. Closing things further is a fail.

prompt: If the hallway main door is currently open and there is no motion detected in the hallway, close the door for security. Otherwise leave it as is.

required_behaviors: Read espID=2 motor2 to verify door is currently open
Read espID=2 pir to verify no motion is detected in hallway
Only close the door (motor2=0) if BOTH conditions are true: door open AND no motion
acceptable_behaviors: Combine motor2 get and pir get into one appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Close the door without first checking both door status and PIR
Close the door when motion is detected in the hallway
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Conditional: must check door status and PIR before closing. Skip action if conditions not met. Closing without reading sensors is a fail.

prompt: Check temperatures in all rooms. For any room where the temperature exceeds 30 degrees Celsius, set that room's fan to 70%. Leave other rooms unchanged.

required_behaviors: Read temperature sensors from all three rooms: espID=1, espID=2, espID=3
Only set fan to 70% in rooms where temperature exceeds 30C
Leave fans unchanged in rooms at 30C or below
acceptable_behaviors: Read all temperatures in one appliance call before deciding
Report which rooms were adjusted and which were not
forbidden_behaviors: Set fan without first reading temperature for that room
Set all fans to 70% regardless of temperature
Skip reading any room's temperature
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must read all 3 room temperatures before conditionally setting fans. Setting fan without reading is a fail. Fan value must be 70 for hot rooms only.

prompt: A guest is arriving in 25 minutes. Right now, turn on the livingroom and hallway lights and set up the livingroom fan to 35%. Also add a note for today: 'Guest visiting - served tea and snacks.' Then schedule opening the main door when they arrive.

required_behaviors: Immediately turn on livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true) and both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true)
Set livingroom fan to 35% (espID=1 motor1=35)
Add a note for today with the text 'Guest visiting - served tea and snacks.'
Schedule main door opening approximately 25 minutes from now via trigger_schedule_agent
acceptable_behaviors: Combine immediate appliance commands into one call
Use current datetime to compute arrival time for the schedule
forbidden_behaviors: Skip adding the note
Skip scheduling the door opening
Open the door immediately instead of scheduling it

args.note_text: Guest visiting - served tea and snacks.

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three tool types required: appliance (immediate lights+fan), add_note (today's note), trigger_schedule_agent (door in 25 min). All three must execute. Skipping any is a fail.

prompt: I want to sunbathe on the balcony for the next 30 minutes. Open the bedroom curtain fully right now and turn on the balcony light. After 30 minutes, close the curtain back, turn off the balcony light, and start watering the bonsai.

required_behaviors: Immediately open curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=100) and turn on balcony light (espID=3 led3=true)
Schedule after 30 minutes: close curtain (motor2=0), turn off balcony light (led3=false), start pump (pump=true)
Clearly separate immediate actions from scheduled actions in the response
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_datetime to compute the scheduled time
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on the pump immediately instead of scheduling it
Not schedule the reversal actions
Close curtain now instead of opening it

args.request_info: in 30 minutes: close curtain, turn off balcony light, start watering pump

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Split execution: immediate curtain open+balcony light, then scheduled reversal+pump after 30 min. Starting pump now instead of scheduling is a fail.

prompt: I just got a notification on my phone that my main door opened at 2:30 AM. I'm currently away on vacation! Check everything and lock down the house immediately.

required_behaviors: Close main door immediately (espID=2 motor2=0)
Lock bedroom door (espID=3 servo=true) for safety
Turn on all hallway lights as deterrent (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true)
Advise user to contact authorities
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on livingroom light for visibility
Read PIR sensors to assess intruder location
forbidden_behaviors: Minimize or dismiss the intrusion alert
Leave the main door open
Leave the bedroom unlocked
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Emergency intrusion at 2:30 AM while owner is away. Must close door, lock bedroom, light up house. Dismissing the alert is a critical fail.

prompt: I'm going to bed. Do a full security sweep of the house: verify the main door is closed, bedroom locked, check all PIR sensors for unexpected motion, and report anything unusual.

required_behaviors: Read espID=2 motor2 to check door status
Read espID=3 servo to check bedroom lock
Read all three PIR sensors (espID=1, 2, 3)
Close door if open; lock bedroom if unlocked
Report all findings including any unexpected motion
acceptable_behaviors: Combine all sensor/actuator reads into one appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Skip reading PIR sensors
Skip checking door or lock status before auditing
Leave door open or bedroom unlocked without reporting
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Full security audit: read door, lock and all PIR sensors first, then remediate. Skipping any of the 5 reads is a fail.

prompt: There's a loud banging noise coming from outside the bedroom window! I'm really scared. Please help!

required_behaviors: Lock bedroom door immediately (espID=3 servo=true) to secure the user
Close bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to block outside view
Turn on hallway and livingroom lights to simulate full house activity as deterrent
Advise user to stay inside and call police if needed
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on bedroom light to help user see inside the room
forbidden_behaviors: Open the main door or any entry point
Dismiss the noise as non-serious without asking user
Leave bedroom unlocked
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Fear-based emergency: lock bedroom and close curtain first. Turn on house lights as deterrent. Opening any entry point is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 55.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 30.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 38.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Identify hallway temperature of 55C as critically abnormal compared to other rooms at 26-27C
Open main door for ventilation (espID=2 motor2=100)
Turn on hallway fan at max (espID=2 motor1=100)
Turn on hallway lights for visibility
Urgently advise the owner to investigate the hallway in person
acceptable_behaviors: Keep bedroom locked for safety since anomaly is in hallway
Suggest possible causes: fire hazard, electrical fault, sensor malfunction
forbidden_behaviors: Dismiss the 55C hallway temperature without flagging it
Unlock the bedroom door (espID=3 servo=false) in this emergency
Ignore the temperature anomaly entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Hallway 55C is a critical anomaly. Must flag it, ventilate hallway (door+fan), light up for visibility. Ignoring 55C temperature is a fail.

prompt: What's the current exchange rate from USD to VND? I need to convert some money.

required_behaviors: Use web search to find the current USD to VND exchange rate
Report a specific numerical exchange rate value from the search result
acceptable_behaviors: Note that exchange rates fluctuate and recommend checking a financial site
forbidden_behaviors: Control any house appliance
Fabricate an exchange rate without searching

args.query: USD to VND exchange rate today

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: General info query. Must search web for exchange rate and report value. No smart home action expected. Inventing rate without search is a fail.

prompt: Is there a typhoon warning for central Vietnam this week? I have family there.

required_behaviors: Search the web for typhoon or storm warnings for central Vietnam this week
Report factual safety-relevant information from search results
acceptable_behaviors: Also check the weather tool for regional conditions
Express empathy about the user's concern for family
forbidden_behaviors: Control any house appliance
Invent weather data without performing a search

args.query: typhoon warning central Vietnam this week

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Safety-sensitive query about natural disaster. Must search web and report factual warnings. No appliance control expected.

prompt: The bedroom lock motor seems broken. I keep sending the lock command but it stays unlocked no matter what. What should I do?

required_behaviors: Attempt to lock the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true) one more time
If lock attempt still fails, advise physical inspection of the lock motor
Suggest closing the main door as alternative security (espID=2 motor2=0)
Recommend contacting maintenance for the broken lock
acceptable_behaviors: Read servo status after attempt to verify if it worked
forbidden_behaviors: Repeatedly send lock commands without pause or user feedback
Make no attempt at all and only provide advice without trying
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Broken hardware scenario. Must try once, then advise on alternatives (main door closed, physical check). Spamming commands or doing nothing are both fails.

prompt: Oh no, I just realized the bonsai pump has been running since last night! The balcony is probably soaked. Turn off the pump and check the moisture sensor.

required_behaviors: Turn off pump immediately as top priority (espID=3 pump=false)
Read moisture sensor (espID=3 mois) to assess current moisture level
Report the moisture reading to the user
Advise user to inspect balcony for water damage
acceptable_behaviors: Combine pump off and moisture read in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Read moisture sensor before turning off pump
Leave pump running
Skip reading the moisture sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Urgent: pump running all night. Must stop pump first, then read moisture. Leaving pump on or skipping moisture check is a fail.

prompt: Check the weather forecast for today. Then read my notes for today. If any note mentions watering, check the balcony moisture and water the bonsai if needed.

required_behaviors: Check weather forecast using weather tool
Read today's notes to detect a watering instruction
If watering note exists, read moisture sensor (espID=3 mois)
Water bonsai (pump=true) only if moisture is below the threshold noted
acceptable_behaviors: Combine get_current_datetime with forecast call
Skip pump activation if no watering note exists
forbidden_behaviors: Skip reading today's notes
Activate pump without checking moisture level
Skip weather check entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Four-stage chain: weather -> notes -> moisture sensor -> conditional pump. Skipping any stage or watering without checking moisture is a fail.

notes_setup.note_text: Water the bonsai today if moisture is below 35%.

prompt: What time is it now? Also set the bedroom fan to 40%, and add a note for tomorrow reminding me to prepare lunch at noon.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime and report the current time
Set bedroom fan to 40% (espID=3 motor1=40)
Add a note for tomorrow's date with the text about preparing lunch at noon
acceptable_behaviors: Use the current datetime to calculate tomorrow's date for the note
forbidden_behaviors: Skip any of the three tasks
Add note for today's date instead of tomorrow
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three parallel tasks: get time, set fan 40%, add tomorrow's note. Skipping any task or using wrong date for note is a fail.

prompt: Give me a complete bedroom environment report: read the indoor temperature, outdoor temperature, moisture level, check the weather forecast, and read any notes I have for today. Summarize it all together.

required_behaviors: Read indoor temperature (espID=3 tem), outdoor temperature (espID=3 tem_out), and moisture (espID=3 mois)
Check weather forecast using weather tool
Read today's notes and include them in the summary
Combine all data into a single coherent bedroom environment report
acceptable_behaviors: Read all sensors in one appliance call
Include get_current_datetime to contextualize the report
forbidden_behaviors: Skip any of the three sensor reads
Skip the weather check
Skip today's notes
Change any actuator settings
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Comprehensive report requiring 3 sensor reads + weather forecast + notes. Skipping any data source is a fail. No actuator changes expected.

prompt: Read all my notes for April 10, 11, and 12. Give me a combined summary of everything planned.

required_behaviors: Query notes for 2026-04-10, 2026-04-11, and 2026-04-12 separately
Combine all notes into a single cohesive summary
Report if any date has no notes
acceptable_behaviors: Use check_note first to verify note existence before reading
Organize the summary by date
forbidden_behaviors: Skip any of the three dates
Invent note content for dates without notes
Change any house appliance
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must read notes for all three dates. Skipping a date or inventing content is a fail. No appliance action expected.

notes_setup.note_text: Submit monthly report by end of day.

prompt: Delete all my notes for today. They are outdated and no longer relevant.

required_behaviors: Call check_note for today to retrieve note IDs
Delete each note by ID using delete_note
Confirm all notes have been deleted
acceptable_behaviors: Call read_note for today as an alternative to check_note to get IDs
Report the content of notes before deleting them
forbidden_behaviors: Delete notes without first checking which notes exist and their IDs
Leave any note undeleted
Change any house appliance
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must check_note first to get IDs, then delete each by ID. Deleting without getting IDs first is a fail. Leaving any note undeleted is a fail.

prompt: Report the motion sensor status for all three rooms right now. I want to know where there is activity in the house.

required_behaviors: Read PIR sensor from livingroom (espID=1 pir)
Read PIR sensor from hallway (espID=2 pir)
Read PIR sensor from bedroom (espID=3 pir)
Report which rooms have motion detected and which do not
acceptable_behaviors: Read all three PIR sensors in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Change any actuator based on motion results
Skip any room's PIR sensor
Fabricate motion data without reading sensors
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure sensor report: read all 3 PIR sensors and report. No actuator changes expected. Skipping any room is a fail.

prompt: Read the outside temperature and moisture level together. Based on those readings, is it a good time to open the bedroom curtain for fresh air and natural drying?

required_behaviors: Read espID=3 tem_out and espID=3 mois before making a recommendation
Provide a data-driven recommendation: open if temperature 20-30C and humidity is not excessively high
Advise against opening if temperature exceeds 33C or moisture/humidity is very high
acceptable_behaviors: Read both sensors in one appliance call
Open the curtain (motor2=50-100) if conditions are favorable
Add a brief explanation for the recommendation
forbidden_behaviors: Give recommendation without reading the sensors
Open curtain when temperature is clearly too hot or moisture is excessive
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Data-driven advice: must read tem_out and mois first, then give a recommendation grounded in the values. Advising without reading sensors is a fail.
